visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a pink top, stands in a large warehouse store. She holds two packaged 'National Geographic' waterproof phone bag sets towards the camera, smiling broadly. The background is filled with shopping aisles and bright overhead lights. (2) Another woman in a dark purple off-shoulder top and a blue beret enters the frame. They both hold the product packages and look at them with surprised expressions, gesturing excitedly with their hands while talking. (3) The first woman turns one of the packages to show the back, pointing at the diagrams illustrating how to wear the bag around the neck or arm. She uses her fingers to trace the instructions while maintaining an enthusiastic facial expression. (4) Both women stand side-by-side, holding the products and smiling directly at the camera. The store environment behind them remains busy with other shoppers and stock shelves visible.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 國家地理的. (2) [Variety]: 兩百元就有. 國家地理三用手機防水袋. (3) [Variety]: 完全防水. (4) [Variety]: 只要455元. (5) [Variety]: 超級划算. 太便宜了吧. (6) [Variety]: 一個227. 也太便宜了吧. 我以為最少要過千元呢. (7) [Variety]: 而且是 國家地理的. (8) [Variety]: 喜歡戶外運動 或帶狗狗玩水. (9) [Variety]: 遊山玩水的人. (10) [Variety]: 一定要來看看 國家地理防水套. (11) [Variety]: 而且它的佩戴方式 有可以掛脖. (12) [Variety]: 然後可以綁在手上. (13) [Variety]: 然後直接泡下去. (14) [Variety]: 他這防水 如果有問題可以馬上拿來. (15) [Variety]: 好市多退貨. (16) [Variety]: 可是你的手機就壞了 哎. (17) [Variety]: 如果有問題的話. (18) [Variety]: 好市多有賣iPhone.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators in the foreground, with at least 3 other shoppers visible in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and is wearing a light pink ribbed top. The other woman has short dark hair, wearing a dark purple off-shoulder top and a blue beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, characterized by high ceilings, industrial shelving, various bulk products, and bright, flat lighting. Christmas decorations like trees are visible in the distance.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with high pitch and high arousal, presenting a product with an excited, welcoming tone. Background music is a light, mid-tempo electronic synthesizer melody with a major tonality. The ambient noise floor is low, suggesting an indoor recording. (2) A second female voice enters with high vocal intensity and rapid speech rate, reacting with surprise to a price. The two voices overlap in a rhythmic conversational flow. (3) The first speaker's tone remains friendly as she details product features; the speech is enunciated clearly. The BGM remains steady in volume underneath the dialogue. (4) The conversation concludes with humorous banter and high-pitched laughter. A brief cartoon-style sound effect is heard during a transition, and the BGM fades out gradually at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Feature Highlight -> Price Reveal -> Usage Demonstration -> Humorous Closing
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is designed to showcase a cost-effective product found at Costco, leveraging the high-energy persona of the creators and clear visual evidence of the deal to drive interest among price-sensitive shoppers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of National Geographic branding on the packaging and the Costco logo at the top of the frame, along with specific pricing information.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a typical social media shopping vlog characterized by high text density and enthusiastic vocal delivery intended to engage a fast-scrolling audience.
